description_long: This is a classic barn structure with a tall, red exterior and a prominent gambrel roof finished in light gray. The front facade features a large double door with a crossbuck design and a smaller, matching window above, both outlined in white trim. The sides and rear of the barn are solid red with vertical paneling, lacking any windows or doors. The roof is steeply pitched and overhangs the walls, providing additional weather protection. The overall form is rectangular with a high, spacious interior typical of agricultural storage buildings. The barn's design is utilitarian yet iconic, evoking traditional rural American architecture.
description: A red barn with a gambrel roof, double crossbuck doors, and a single window above the entrance. The sides and rear are solid with vertical paneling and no openings.
description_view_0: Front view showing double crossbuck doors and a single window above, both with white trim.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid red wall with vertical paneling and the overhanging gray gambrel roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain red wall and vertical paneling, no doors or windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with solid red paneling and the overhanging roof.
attribute_door_style: double hinged doors with crossbuck design
attribute_window_arrangement: single centered window above the main doors on the front facade
